# Ibex tracer fixtures

`official_sample_022f0840.log` is copied from the documented trace-format example in `doc/03_reference/tracer.rst` at lowRISC/ibex commit `022f084096baed0a9b5ebdf697ed2965f13e8ed8`.

Source:

- https://github.com/lowRISC/ibex/blob/022f084096baed0a9b5ebdf697ed2965f13e8ed8/doc/03_reference/tracer.rst

The upstream file is Apache-2.0 licensed. The fixture is documentation-derived evidence of the official text format; it is **not** presented as a simulation run performed by this repository.
